title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, bootstrapped to $10M ARR without external funding. The episode covers his exact playbook for reaching $1M ARR in 117 days, strategies for reducing churn, pricing experimentation, and decision-making frameworks for scaling a no-code AI platform business.
